chapter_goal: Connect divisors, line bundles, positivity, projective embeddings, blowups, and Grassmannians through visible compatibility checks.

visual_sequence.inspection_target: triple-overlap transition product closes to one
visual_sequence.invariant: cocycle product equals 1 and divisor degree ledger is additive
visual_sequence.representation: weighted components plus Cech cocycle graph

visual_sequence.concept: Vanishing, Lefschetz, and Kodaira embedding theorem inputs
visual_sequence.inspection_target: positivity and Kahler hypotheses feed cohomology and embedding conclusions
visual_sequence.invariant: each theorem node has explicit prerequisite edges

visual_sequence.inspection_target: a single point is replaced by a projective line of slopes
visual_sequence.invariant: blowup chart equations agree away from the exceptional divisor
visual_sequence.representation: two affine charts plus exceptional divisor of directions

visual_sequence.concept: Grassmannians, Schubert cells, and Plucker embedding
visual_sequence.inspection_target: row operations change a matrix but not its Plucker point
visual_sequence.invariant: Klein quadric relation is zero for every sampled two-plane
visual_sequence.representation: cell dimension grid and exact Plucker relation
